  • Uses of StormConfig in st.orm

    Methods in st.orm that return StormConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static StormConfig
    StormConfig.defaults()
    Returns a configuration that reads exclusively from JVM system properties.
    static StormConfig
    StormConfig.of(Map<String,String> properties)
    Creates a new StormConfig with the given properties.

  • Uses of StormConfig in st.orm.core.repository.impl

    Methods in st.orm.core.repository.impl with parameters of type StormConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static UpdateMode
    DirtySupport.getUpdateMode(RecordType recordType, StormConfig config)
    Returns the effective UpdateMode for the given record type using the given config for defaults.

    Methods in st.orm.core.spi with parameters of type StormConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static CacheRetention
    CacheRetention.fromConfig(StormConfig config)
    Resolves the cache retention from the given configuration.
    SqlDialect
    DefaultSqlDialectProviderImpl.getSqlDialect(StormConfig config)
     
    static SqlDialect
    Providers.getSqlDialect(Predicate<? super SqlDialectProvider> filter, StormConfig config)
     
    static SqlDialect
    Providers.getSqlDialect(StormConfig config)
     
    SqlDialect
    SqlDialectProvider.getSqlDialect(StormConfig config)
    Returns the SQL dialect configured with the given StormConfig.

  • Uses of StormConfig in st.orm.core.template

    Methods in st.orm.core.template that return StormConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    StormConfig
    ORMTemplate.config()
    Returns the configuration associated with this template.
    Methods in st.orm.core.template with parameters of type StormConfig
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JpaTemplate
    JpaTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config)
    Creates a new JPA template for the given entity manager, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, StormConfig config)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, StormConfig config)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    JpaTemplate.ORM(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config)
    Creates a new ORM template for the given entity manager, configured with the provided StormConfig.
    SqlTemplate
    SqlTemplate.withConfig(StormConfig config)
    Returns a new SQL template with the specified Storm configuration.
